seo.defaultDescription: Investment insights, market analysis, and agile innovation at YT2Future.

footer.address: Binh Tan, Ho Chi Minh City
footer.description: Shaping tomorrow through agile thinking and continuous innovation.

stock.title: Stock Market
stock.desc: Updating foundational knowledge for beginners, with a simple, easy-to-understand analytical approach and gradual market familiarization.

realEstate.title: Real Estate
realEstate.desc: Synthesizing ongoing projects nationwide, updating price levels by region, and analyzing real estate businesses through actual project portfolios.

macro.title: Macroeconomics
macro.desc: Analyzing the impact of economic policies in Vietnam on specific sectors, updating operating interest rates and monetary/foreign exchange policies to propose potential sectors for each stage.

mindset.title: Financial Mindset
mindset.desc: Designing a complete roadmap for beginner investors, especially office workers, helping access financial knowledge in an easy-to-understand way and applying it effectively in practice.

feedback.title: Customer
feedback.loginRequired: Please sign in to send feedback!

about.title: About
about.desc1: YT2Future is built on the belief that a sustainable financial future begins with agile thinking and a spirit of continuous innovation. We provide investment knowledge, market analysis, and curated financial information, aiming to help readers understand the true nature of investment and make decisions based on long-term thinking.
about.desc2: YT2Future wishes to accompany the community on a journey of learning, adapting, and creating the future through knowledge.

explore.title: Core
explore.desc: We focus on core market sectors where innovation is happening most vigorously.

about.headline: Shaping tomorrow through agile thinking and continuous innovation.
about.description: YT2Future is built on the belief that sustainable financial future begins with agile thinking and continuous innovation. We provide curated investment knowledge, market analysis, and financial information, aiming to help readers understand the true nature of investing and make decisions based on long-term thinking. YT2Future aspires to accompany the community on the journey of learning, adapting, and shaping the future through knowledge.

knowledge.title: KNOWLEDGE SYSTEM
knowledge.desc: Sharing knowledge and experience distilled from learning and investment practice.

thinking.title: ANALYTICAL THINKING
thinking.desc: Training multi-dimensional market perspective, from macro to enterprise fundamentals.

community.title: COMMUNITY CONNECTION
community.desc: Building an open learning community where all perspectives are respected and debated.

contact.desc: We are always ready to listen and answer all your questions about investment solutions and strategic cooperation.
contact.name: Full Name
contact.subject: Subject

values.address: Binh Tan, Ho Chi Minh City

auth.signUpSuccessRedirect: Sign-up successful! Please sign in now.

usersPage.title: User management
usersPage.subtitle: {count} users | Page {page}
usersPage.confirmDelete: Are you sure you want to delete user "{userName}"?

toast.serverBusy: Server is busy, please try again.

categoriesPage.title: Category management
categoriesPage.confirmDelete: Are you sure you want to delete category "{catName}"?

toast.deleteError: Cannot delete category while reports still exist.

servicesPage.title: Services (Products & Services page)
servicesPage.modalSaveHint: Close: X top-right, click the dimmed area outside the panel, or press Esc. Save: button bottom-right. Scroll up for slug, order, and preview link.
servicesPage.englishDetailHelp: Turn the checkbox on and use the EN tab to fill the same sections as Vietnamese. Visitors who pick English on the site will see this page after you Save. The English catalog card above is optional (short title and excerpt).
servicesPage.partnerLogosIntro: Each partner has its own name and logo. Paste an image URL or use Upload — file goes to Cloudinary (HTTPS, max 6MB). Shown after Save.
servicesPage.partnerLogosEmpty: No partners yet — add a partner, then enter its name and logo.
servicesPage.imageUrlOrUploadHint: Paste an image URL, or use Upload — file goes to Cloudinary; URL is saved to the DB.

table.empty: No services yet. Run the backend seed or create one.

form.slugHint: Lowercase letters, numbers, hyphens — e.g. trade-finance-a
form.catalogPillLinePlaceholder: One line on the card (e.g. collect cash earlier after delivery)
form.catalogShellCaption: Edit the cards like the public /services page — VI and EN (English optional). One image URL for both. The three pills match the hero stat lines below (VI / EN respectively).
form.catalogViIncomplete: Fill in the Vietnamese card title and excerpt.
form.contentEnPlaceholder: Leave empty if you do not have English JSON yet

detail.viIntro: Each field is a normal input; lists have add/remove lines. Saved data still matches the backend JSON schema.
detail.enIntro: Fill the same structure in English.

placeholders.heroTag: e.g. TRADE FINANCE · SOLUTIONS (small caps line)
placeholders.heroTitle: Main headline: one line value proposition
placeholders.heroDescription: 2–4 sentences: problem → how you solve it → benefit. Keep it scannable.
placeholders.introVideoUrl: Leave empty for default. Or paste YouTube / direct .mp4 URL
placeholders.videoPreviewHint: Short hint under the video tile
placeholders.processStep: Describe the step: who does what, output
placeholders.partnersPlaceholder: Placeholder text for logo strip until assets exist
placeholders.catalogPillLine: One line on the card (e.g. collect cash earlier after delivery)

detail.introVideoUrlHelp: Leave empty to use the default homepage clip. Fastest: paste a YouTube link (watch / embed / youtu.be) or a direct .mp4 / .webm URL (https or a path under /public).
detail.emptyVi: Please fill in the Vietnamese detail content (at least the Hero section).

form.previewHelp: Opens a new tab. The public page only shows data after you save and turn on "Published"; if you change the slug, save then click again.
form.previewNeedSlug: Enter a URL slug to enable the preview link.

toast.saveError: Save failed (check duplicate slug or missing content)
toast.uploadImageError: Image upload failed (sign in or Cloudinary).

servicesPage.confirmDelete: Delete service "{slug}"? This cannot be undone.

confirm.title: Confirm delete
confirm.body: Are you sure you want to delete this feedback? This action cannot be undone.

investment_page.title: Products & Services
investment_page.layoutTitle: A responsive-first layout for desktop, tablet, and mobile.
investment_page.layoutDescription: Current text is placeholder. The focus is the structural UX blocks: service catalog, detail view, process flow, and scalable responsive behavior.
investment_page.scaffoldDescription: This is a production-ready UI/UX scaffold. Real content (text/images) can be swapped later without redesigning layout architecture.

services_list.loadError: Could not load services. Check: (1) the API server is running (default port 5000), (2) run `npx prisma migrate deploy` and `npm run seed:services` in the backend folder, (3) if you use `next start` without Nginx, set `INTERNAL_API_ORIGIN` for Next (e.g. http://127.0.0.1:5000).
services_list.empty: No published services yet. Add one in admin or run the backend seed script.
services_list.intro: Choose a service below for the full narrative, implementation flow, and practical benefits for your business.
services_list.cardTeaserHint: Short description; open the card for the full detail page.
services_list.cardEmptyImageEdit: No image yet — paste URL below
services_list.metaDescription: Trade-finance products and service solutions for enterprises at YT2Future.

sector_page.metaDescription: Explore in-depth sector research and market reports on YT2Future.
